blocks.text: Bodo/Glimt can make Norwegian football history at San Siro tonight
A 3-1 lead taken to San Siro — Norwegian football has never been this close to a Champions League quarter-final. Glimt have already made history. Tonight they can make legend.

items: PSG vs Monaco 21:00 — PSG lead 3-2, French derby on the edge

Juventus vs Galatasaray 21:00 — Juve need a miracle in Turin
